mapper.insert: insert into `study_checkin` (user_id, user_role, checkin_date, streak_days) values (#{userId}, #{userRole}, #{checkinDate}, #{streakDays})
mapper.select: select sc.* from `study_checkin` sc inner join ( select user_id, user_role, max(streak_days) as max_streak from `study_checkin` group by user_id, user_role ) t on sc.user_id = t.user_id and sc.user_role = t.user_role and sc.streak_days = t.max_streak group by sc.user_id, sc.user_role order by sc.streak_days desc limit 20
